name: GT Biopharma, Inc.
business: GT Biopharma is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing novel immuno-oncology products based on its proprietary Tri-specific Killer Engager (TriKE) and Tetra-specific Killer Engager (Dual Targeting TriKE) fusion protein platforms. These platforms generate therapeutics designed to harness and enhance the cancer-killing abilities of a patient's own natural killer cells, targeting hematologic malignancies, solid tumors, and autoimmune disorders.
sellsTo: patients with hematologic malignancies (e.g., acute myelogenous leukemia, myelodysplastic syndromes)
patients with solid tumors expressing B7-H3

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the development and commercialization of novel immuno-oncology products based on our proprietary Tri-specific Killer Engager ( TriKE ), and Tetra-specific Killer Engager ( Dual Targeting TriKE ) fusion protein immune cell engager technology platforms.

catalysts.sentence: In late June 2024, the FDA cleared our IND Application for GTB-3650.
We started study enrollment targeting patients with relapsed/refractory AML and high grade MDS on January 21, 2025.
In early January 2026, the FDA cleared our IND Application for GTB-5550.
We anticipate starting study enrollment in mid-year 2026.

tamClaims.claim: AML incidence rate of 4.3% per 100,000 population
tamClaims.sentence: AML is a heterogeneous hematologic stem cell malignancy in adults with an incidence rate of 4.3% per 100,000 populations.

tamClaims.claim: Over 10,000 new MDS cases diagnosed each year
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that over 10,000 new cases of MDS are diagnosed each year and there are minimal treatment options; other estimates have put this number higher.
